1. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/25/24, 5:10 AM
    
    When the party arrives at Silverstep, Riven feels at home—something rare for the wandering ranger. The peaceful lake, quiet community, and majestic mountains make this the most idyllic town in Freehaven. Though known for its learning, its beauty remains a quiet secret. Sitting by the shore, Riven listens to the murmur of the lake and the distant birdsong. “This place... it reminds me of Avennara, where I grew up,” he says softly. After a pause, he adds, “Lyriel would love it here. She’d set her easel on that knoll,” he gestures to a perfect spot, “and paint the day away.” He hesitates before murmuring, “Maybe I’ll reach out to her. Maybe she’ll come.”
    
    [](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1299102834264117319/1299102839242752000/silverstep.webp?ex=6a1de74d&is=6a1c95cd&hm=1bf4ff0a5b77b8986643431097afb302afc2e1d374a8b9d94aaca9abdf8518ea&)
    
    ![Image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1299102834264117319/1299102839242752000/silverstep.webp?ex=6a1de74d&is=6a1c95cd&hm=1bf4ff0a5b77b8986643431097afb302afc2e1d374a8b9d94aaca9abdf8518ea&=&format=webp&width=700&height=700)![](data:image/png;base64,)
    
2. @Danny @Jon [Lucas] @Slava [Astor] @Darren [Pavel] @Tom [Lee] @Billy [Milo]
    
3. Wes [Riven] changed the channel name: **11. Rest & Relaxation at Silverstep** _—_ 10/25/24, 5:13 AM
    
4. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/25/24, 5:20 AM
    
    The party is nearby and Linzi is also in Silverstep to help with Kingdom business. @Danny
    
5. ### Danny _—_ 10/25/24, 8:41 AM
    
    Linzi says "Mmm, yes I agree. I purposefully haven't done an article on Silverstep in the Freehaven Gazette because I'm afraid it will get overrun. It's very unlike me to not want to get the scoop on hot news like this, but I just love this place too much." "But, I'm almost done with an article on Bronzeshield Hold, so don't think it is just me slacking off." Suddenly awareness breaks on her face and she turns a bit red and blurts to Benedin: "Oh, I don't mean that Bronzeshield Hold isn't just as lovely! Please don't misunderstand! I think it is a wonderful place, of course. And eventually when the troll scent dies down, it will probably be our most active vacation spot I'm sure!!"
    
6. "So," Linzi continues to Riven, "tell us more about this 'Lyriel'".
    
7. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 10/25/24, 12:04 PM
    
    Pavel walks up as Linzi finishes speaking. He looks at the handful of tiny buildings, sighs, and says "This place used to be so beautiful. Now it's all crowded." He looks at Linzi. "What's a Lyriel?"
    
8. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/26/24, 5:52 AM
    
    “Lyriel means more to me than I can express in this tongue,” Riven says, fingers brushing over the small amulet beneath his tunic. He pulls it free, letting it catch the morning light—an exquisite rendering of a moon and a rose. “She gave me this before we parted. I thought I was sparing her from my shame... told myself it was duty. But over the years, and with all of you beside me, I see it now for what it was—a foolish mistake.” His grip tightens on the pendant. “She was my anchor, my true north. I should have stayed by her side. And if I could tell her one thing now...” His voice trails off as he tucks the amulet back under his tunic, as if securing a piece of his heart. “It’s that I’d never make that mistake again.” He hesitates, glancing over at Linzi. “Lately, I’ve wondered if it’s not too late. Maybe I could reach out to her, but I don’t know where to start. Linzi, you’re better with words than I am. Do you think... should I write her a letter, or go back to Kyonin?”
    ![[lyriel-gift.webp]]
    
10. ### Danny _—_ 10/27/24, 4:14 AM
    
    "Oh absolutely!" Linzi says to Riven. "I'll help. Writing is my thing you know"
    
11. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/29/24, 3:58 AM
    
    Riven’s shoulders relax, a genuine smile breaking through. “Thank you, Linzi.” He bends down, picking up a smooth, flat stone. Turning it thoughtfully in his hand, he feels its weight before sending it skipping across the lake, ripples spreading out into the stillness.
    
12. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/30/24, 7:44 AM
    
    After a moment, Riven skips another rock and asks @Slava [Astor], "How is Bronzeshield Hold coming along? I haven't visited recently. Have many of your people come back yet?"
    
13. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 10/31/24, 2:30 AM
    
    ( @Danny I was thinking I'd get an update from you here, or should I just improv the progress?)
    
14.  [FROG], 
    
    ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/31/24, 2:33 AM
    
    Right now mechanically, it’s a village which means <400 people. Soon it will be a town with 400-2000 people.
    
15. ### Danny _—_ 11/1/24, 2:04 AM
    
    You can improve the details beyond what Wes shared
    
16. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 11/2/24, 7:44 AM
    
    _Benedin frowns. An easy resting expression for his face, when he's not playing up the charm._ **"Precious few for now. Most of the noise is the builders and the merchants that followed them."** _His eyes follow the stone across the water's surface._ **"I've been trying to get the word out, but it only goes so far before getting drowned out..."** **"So I've got high hopes for your article, Linzi. I'm counting on your help to spread the news to my scattered family, not just the tourists.**
    
17. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 11/5/24, 6:42 AM
    
    “Looks like both of our futures depend on our Freehaven Maven.” Riven nods thoughtfully. “Word spreads slowly, but I’ll do my part. I’ll mention Bronzeshield to our neighbors—Mivon to the south and Restov to the north. We now have relations with both of those countries.” He pauses, a faint smile appearing. “And if Linzi’s article has half the charm of her tales, Bronzeshield will be buzzing with your kin before long.”
